title: Welcome Page Online
summary: Confirm the default Nginx site is reachable and understand the minimum static-site config.

scenario.businessContext: Nginx is installed on a test machine, but the home page is still unavailable. Make the default site respond successfully.

mustPass.description: The home page must return HTTP 200.

hiddenTests.description: Verify that the solution resolves / through an index file instead of hard-coding a response.

whyItWorks: The default site must first match a server block, then use root and index together to resolve /.
If root exists but index is missing, / may not resolve to the expected landing page.

commonMistakes.title: Set root only
commonMistakes.reason: Beginners often assume the directory will automatically map to the welcome page file.

commonMistakes.title: Use return 200 with a hard-coded body
commonMistakes.reason: That can pass a shallow test but does not teach how a real static site works.
